title: CBB Rulebook Volume 6 Crypto-Asset Module
summary: Regulates crypto-asset licensing, exchanges, dealing, advisory, portfolio management, custody, client protection, marketing, technology governance, cyber security, wallet controls, risk management, reporting, approvals, information gathering, conduct obligations, market abuse controls, and digital-token rules.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.blockchain_web3: Main Bahrain framework for regulated crypto-asset services.
theme_notes.digital_finance.virtual_assets: Main regulatory framework for crypto-asset services.

notes: Related instruments: Replaced or absorbed the 2018 CPO Module and amended by 2023 digital-token amendments
